{ "name": "shebang-regex", "version": "3.0.0", "description": "Regular expression for matching a shebang line", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/shebang-regex", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "sindresorhus.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=8" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "regex", "regexp", "shebang", "match", "test", "line" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^1.4.1", "tsd": "^0.7.2", "xo": "^0.24.0" } }
